name: expression
what_it_solves: Evidence modality 'expression' consumed by the multimodal fuser.
how_it_solves: Contributes weight 1 to the fused score. Positive/negative/null verdicts are aggregated with signed contributions.
why_it_exists: Weights are hard-coded to reflect scientific hierarchy — clinical evidence dominates cell-line signals; CRISPR + expression are supporting only.
